Validating the current device identity a: Validating the current device identity and eligibility.

USB Guardian verified logical removal an: USB Guardian verified logical removal and shfs health. You can now physically unplug the device.

The saved operation belongs to a differe: The saved operation belongs to a different boot identity.

The server lease was not renewed within: The server lease was not renewed within five seconds.
The stored approval no longer matches th: The stored approval no longer matches the verified server authority.

Run safe eject again and wait for a new: Run safe eject again and wait for a new verified approval. Do not unplug the device.
